name: Sea Life Park Hawaii
tagline: Dolphin shows, sea lion encounters, and a huge reef tank right at Makapuu — touristy but the keiki love it.
hours: Daily 10am–4pm; check website for seasonal hours
bestTime: Arrive at opening to catch the first dolphin show with fewer crowds
kamaaina: Kamaaina annual pass is a solid deal if you go more than twice a year
talkStory: Best for ages 3-12. The dolphin and sea lion shows keep kids glued. The bird sanctuary walkthrough and the reef tank viewing area are included with admission. Swim-with-dolphin programs book out fast — reserve weeks ahead. Bring reef-safe sunscreen and hats, there's limited shade. Combine with a drive to Makapuu Lookout right next door.
